summary: Two-layer freshness for stored statements. Lazy TTL (stale-while-revalidate, per-symbol dedup, as_of surfaced) + earnings-aware ingest (Finnhub calendar -> earnings_watch queue, poll every 30m in window, done when MAX(period_end) advances, age-out at T+2 NYSE trading days via exchange_calendars XNYS). In-process asyncio scheduler in lifespan, resumable via DB tables. Verified live: tables created, scheduler started, calendar sync ran (no upcoming earnings for tracked names = correct), as_of in statements+metrics, health pending count. 16 new tests incl. holiday-skip assertion; full suite 283 passed (2 pre-existing Alpaca failures). ruff + strict mypy + mandate gate green.
